title: Potatoubly Optimized
description: A Minecraft modpack designed to boost performance and enhance quality of life, making the game SMOOTHER and more ENJOYABLE and look PREMIUM, even on POTATO hardware.
body:
## What is Potatoubly Optimized?
*Potatoubly Optimized* is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack built to redefine how the game performs and feels, especially for players using low-end or "potato" hardware. This modpack makes you feel less poor and prioritizes significant performance improvements on the client side while seamlessly integrating server-side optimizations for single-player and integrated multiplayer experiences. The result? A buttery-smooth gameplay experience that rivals what you'd expect on high-end setup.
### Does it include Quality of life mods?
Yes! *Potatoubly Optimized* isn’t just about speed; it’s about style and functionality, too. It comes packed with a wide selection of aesthetic enhancements, resource packs, and quality-of-life (QoL) mods designed to elevate the overall experience. From premium looking Ui and immersive menus to handy features that streamline gameplay, this modpack delivers a premium Minecraft adventure without compromising on accessibility. 
### What mods does this modpack include?
We curated the best mod set to improve performance while still aiming to improve the premium feel. You can try out [Vukan-Ism](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkan-ism) to improve performance using the Vulkan engine if thats your taste!

Whether you're building your dream base or exploring the vast landscapes, *Potatoubly Optimized* ensures your game runs efficiently while looking and feeling better than ever. Perfect for players who demand more from their hardware without the need for costly upgrades, this modpack brings the best of both worlds—performance and polish.
### Dependencies

<summary>Expand</summary>
